texto: I would like to start by emphasizing the importance of surfaces. It is at a surface where many of our most interesting and useful phenomena occur. We live for example on the surface of a planet. It is at a surface where the catalysis of chemical reactions occur. It is essentially at a surface of a plant that sunlight is converted to a sugar. In electronics, most if not all active circuit elements involve non-equilibrium phenomena occurring at surfaces. Much of biology is concerned with reactions at a surface.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Walter Houser Brattain: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I would like to start by emphasizing the importance of surfaces. It is at a surface where many of…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, biology, chemical-reactions pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de estudos e chemical-reactions.
